description: RESEARCHER_A acquires BACKGROUND_SECTION and INTRO_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_B acquires BACKGROUND_SECTION and RELATED_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_C acquires METHODS_SECTION and RELATED_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_D acquires EXPERIMENTS_SECTION and METHODS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_E acquires EXPERIMENTS_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_F acquires DISCUSSION_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_G acquires DISCUSSION_SECTION and INTRO_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
Each researcher drafts locally before acquiring section locks for writing
Ring-shaped circular wait across 7 researchers: each holds one section lock and waits for the next, forming a 7-node cycle
Partial circular wait: any subset of adjacent researchers in the ring can form a shorter deadlock cycle
